languages.text: {n}Визор Паскаля наливается алым, а из вокса раздается уязвленный бинарный скрежет. Техножрец не удостаивает манипулуса ответом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Визор Паскаля наливается алым, а из вокса раздается уязвленный бинарный скрежет. Техножрец не удостаивает манипулуса ответом.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Pasqal's visor flashes scarlet, and a stricken binharic screech erupts from his vox. The Tech-Priest does not dignify the Manipulus with a reply.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Визор Паскаля наливается алым, а из вокса раздается уязвленный бинарный скрежет. Техножрец не удостаивает манипулуса ответом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Pasqal's visor flashes scarlet, and a stricken binharic screech erupts from his vox. The Tech-Priest does not dignify the Manipulus with a reply.{/n}
{n}Pasqal's visor flashes scarlet, and a stricken binharic screech erupts from his vox. The Tech-Priest does not dignify the Manipulus with a reply.{/n}
{n}Pasqal's visor flashes scarlet, and a stricken binharic screech erupts from his vox. The Tech-Priest does not dignify the Manipulus with a reply.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El visor de Pasqal se tiñe de escarlata y de su voco brota un chirrido binario espantado. El tecnosacerdote no da otra respuesta al manipulus.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's visor flashes scarlet, and a stricken binharic screech erupts from his vox. The Tech-Priest does not dignify the Manipulus with a reply.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El visor de Pasqal se tiñe de escarlata y de su voco brota un chirrido binario espantado. El tecnosacerdote no da otra respuesta al manipulus.{/n}

languages.text: {n}帕斯卡的目镜骤然闪出猩红的光芒，一声尖锐刺耳的二进制尖啸从他的音阵中爆发出来。这位技术神甫根本不屑于用言语回应那位操纵者。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's visor flashes scarlet, and a stricken binharic screech erupts from his vox. The Tech-Priest does not dignify the Manipulus with a reply.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}帕斯卡的目镜骤然闪出猩红的光芒，一声尖锐刺耳的二进制尖啸从他的音阵中爆发出来。这位技术神甫根本不屑于用言语回应那位操纵者。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La visière de Pasqal vire à l'écarlate, et son vox émet un son binhaire strident. Le technoprêtre s'abstient de faire l'honneur d'une réponse au manipulus.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's visor flashes scarlet, and a stricken binharic screech erupts from his vox. The Tech-Priest does not dignify the Manipulus with a reply.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La visière de Pasqal vire à l'écarlate, et son vox émet un son binhaire strident. Le technoprêtre s'abstient de faire l'honneur d'une réponse au manipulus.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Pasqal'ın vizöründen kızıl bir parıltı çıkıyor, voksu ise acı dolu bir ikilidil çığlık basıyor. Tekno Rahip, Manipülus'a cevap verme lütfunda bulunmuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's visor flashes scarlet, and a stricken binharic screech erupts from his vox. The Tech-Priest does not dignify the Manipulus with a reply.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Pasqal'ın vizöründen kızıl bir parıltı çıkıyor, voksu ise acı dolu bir ikilidil çığlık basıyor. Tekno Rahip, Manipülus'a cevap verme lütfunda bulunmuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Pasqals Visor färbt sich violett und aus seinem Vox ertönt eine binhärische Ansprache. Der Techpriester würdigt den Manipulus keiner Antwort.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's visor flashes scarlet, and a stricken binharic screech erupts from his vox. The Tech-Priest does not dignify the Manipulus with a reply.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Pasqals Visor färbt sich violett und aus seinem Vox ertönt eine binhärische Ansprache. Der Techpriester würdigt den Manipulus keiner Antwort.{/n}

languages.text: {n}パスクールのバイザーが赤く光り、彼のボイスから悲鳴が響く。テクプリストはマニピュラスに答える品位すら示さない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Pasqal's visor flashes scarlet, and a stricken binharic screech erupts from his vox. The Tech-Priest does not dignify the Manipulus with a reply.{/n}
